name: Strawberry-Banana Jell-o Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package Instant banana pudding mix, large size
12 oz Cool whip, defrosted in refrigerator
1 cup Fruit cocktail, drained, large size
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Jell-O as directed on the package.
2. Refrigerate for 3 or 4 hours.
3. Add all other ingredients (pudding is dry) to the Jell-O and stir until well combined, leaving small chunks of Jell-O intact.
4. Put back in the refrigerator until time to serve.
